chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 267 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 20-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received, which shows that petitioner and his counsel have lost their interest in proceeding of this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
